title: Feather Boost
description: This Modpack is boost your fps
body:
🌟 Feather Boost – The Ultimate FPS Optimization Modpack 🌟

Feather Boost is a performance-focused Minecraft modpack built specially for players who want maximum FPS, smoother gameplay, and lag-free performance without compromising the original feel of the game. Designed with Feather Client users in mind, this pack is packed with the most effective optimization and performance mods like Sodium, Lithium, Starlight, and more to give you the best possible experience.

Unlike heavy modpacks that add unnecessary features, Feather Boost focuses only on speed, stability, and performance. Whether you’re on a high-end PC or struggling with a low-end system, this modpack will push your hardware to its limit and unlock the smoothest possible Minecraft experience.

⚡ Why Choose Feather Boost?

🚀 Massive FPS Boost – Unlock higher frame rates than ever before.

⚙️ Sodium + Lithium Powered – Industry-leading performance mods for rendering and logic optimization.

🌌 Starlight Integration – Fixes Minecraft’s outdated light engine for ultra-fast performance.

🖥️ Optimized for Feather Client – Works perfectly with Feather Client’s sleek UI and settings.

🔧 Pre-configured Settings – Plug and play, no complicated setup required.

🎮 Smooth PvP & Survival Gameplay – Reduced lag spikes, faster world loading, and stable frame pacing.

🛠️ Included Performance Mods (Highlights)

Sodium – Next-gen rendering for huge FPS improvements.

Lithium – Optimizes game logic for smoother tick rates.

Starlight – Complete overhaul of Minecraft’s light engine for faster chunk updates.

FerriteCore & Memory Mods – Reduce memory usage and stuttering.

Entity & Chunk Optimization Mods – Keep your world running fast, even in late game.

🎯 Who is Feather Boost For?

Players with low-end PCs/laptops who struggle with lag.

PvP players who want consistent frame rates during fights.

Survival/Builders who want smooth gameplay in big worlds.

Anyone who loves Minecraft but hates stutters, lag spikes, and slow performance.

🔥 With Feather Boost, you’re not just playing Minecraft – you’re unlocking its full potential. Download now and experience the difference of a true FPS-boosted adventure!
